heading: Rights and protections relating to veterans’ employment and reemployment
label: 416 Rights and protections relating to veterans’ employment and reemployment
notes: Amendments2010—Subsec. (b). substituted “under ” for “under paragraphs (1) and (2)(A) of ”.Pub. L. 111–275section 4323(d) of title 38section 4323(c) of title 38

children.heading: Employment and Reemployment Rights of Members of the Uniformed Services.—
children.label: a Employment and Reemployment Rights of Members of the Uniformed Services.—
A
children.text: discriminate, within the meaning of subsections (a) and (b) of , against an eligible employee;section 4311 of title 38

children.label: B
children.text: deny to an eligible employee reemployment rights within the meaning of sections 4312 and 4313 of title 38; or

children.label: C
children.text: deny to an eligible employee benefits within the meaning of sections 4316, 4317, and 4318 of title 38.

children.heading: .—Definition
children.label: 2 .—Definition
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “eligible employee” means a covered employee performing service in the uniformed services, within the meaning of , whose service has not been terminated upon the occurrence of any of the events enumerated in section 4304 of such title.section 4303(13) of title 38

children.heading: .—Remedy
children.label: b .—Remedy
children.text: The remedy for a violation of subsection (a) shall be such damages as would be appropriate if awarded under .section 4323(d) of title 38

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: The President, or the designee of the President, shall issue regulations to implement this section.

children.label: A
children.text: except to the extent that the President or designee may determine, for good cause shown and stated together with the regulation, that a modification of such regulations would be more effective for the implementation of the rights and protections under this section; and

children.label: i
children.text: would be equally effective for the implementation of the rights and protections under this section; and

children.label: ii
children.text: would promote uniformity in the application of Federal law to employees in the executive branch of the Federal Government.
the effective date of regulations issued under subsection (c); or
